title: Intent contract (v2 — Next2.1 Loop Ingress)
description: Captured at Loop Ingress (plan §4.6 Next2.1): the goal/standard/proof-of-done triple that anchors a loop's loop_id and maps onto the existing closure_contract, moved to ingress. Drafted via vendored brainstorming (→spec, HARD-GATE) + writing-plans; an INTAKE COMPLETENESS gate refuses to start a loop with no definition of done. Per the §1.7-D / OQ-B resolution, async MAY prepare + recommend the contract, but final human confirmation is non-negotiable: confirmed_by_human flips to true ONLY by the authorized human's explicit act — the engine never auto-confirms. Also embeddable at charter top-level intent_contract{}.

goal.description: Objective: what this loop is for, in customer terms.

standard.description: The bar: what 'good' means for this loop (quality/scope standard).

proof_of_done.description: Eval method / definition of done: the evidence that demonstrates the goal was met to the standard. Maps to closure_contract proof.

loop_id.description: The loop this contract anchors (Audit Spine loop_id; plan §4.5). Threads charter→brief→checkpoint→spawn→verdict→close.

confirmed_by_human.description: Authority gate. true ONLY by the authorized human's explicit confirmation (§1.7-D / OQ-B). The engine MUST NOT auto-confirm; async may draft + recommend, never close this gate.

confirmed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of human confirmation; null until confirmed.

confirmed_by.description: Identifier of the authorized human who confirmed (audit attribution).

drafted_by.description: OPTIONAL: which role/skill drafted the recommendation (e.g. research:brainstorming). Drafting is async-permitted; it does not confirm.
